# Digiveritaz

> Digiveritaz is a performance-driven digital marketing agency in India delivering SEO, PPC, branding and growth strategies for measurable business success. 15+ years of combined experience, 60+ active clients, ₹65Cr+ in revenue generated, 1.15L+ leads delivered and 4–10× ROAS achieved across India and globally.

Digiveritaz blends marketing wisdom with AI-infused agility. Every engagement is built around three pillars — **Launch → Optimize → Scale** — with transparent dashboards, defined OKRs, and accountability to real revenue metrics (CAC, LTV, ROAS), not vanity numbers.

Primary headquarters: Mumbai, India. Serving brands across India and worldwide.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://digiveritaz.com/): Best digital marketing agency in India delivering SEO, PPC, branding and growth strategies for measurable business success.
- [About Digiveritaz](https://digiveritaz.com/about-us/): India-based digital marketing agency helping brands grow through SEO, paid ads, branding, and ROI-focused strategies.
- [Services Overview](https://digiveritaz.com/services/): Full-suite digital marketing services in India including SEO, PPC, performance marketing, paid social, WhatsApp marketing and branding.
- [Case Studies](https://digiveritaz.com/case-study/): Real-world digital marketing case studies showcasing growth-driven results for brands across India — lead gen, SEO and PPC wins.
- [Blog & Insights](https://digiveritaz.com/blog/): Expert insights, trends and strategies on SEO, PPC, AI and performance marketing — updated weekly.
- [Contact Us](https://digiveritaz.com/contact-us/): Book a free 30-min strategy call to discuss SEO, PPC and performance marketing solutions for your business in India.
- [FAQ](https://digiveritaz.com/faq/): Common questions about digital marketing, SEO and performance marketing services for businesses and brands across India.

## Marketing Services

- [SEO Services](https://digiveritaz.com/seo/): Data-led SEO services in India focused on long-term organic growth and measurable search performance — rankings, traffic, leads.
- [Social Media Management](https://digiveritaz.com/social-media-management/): Strategy, content creation and monthly performance reporting to manage and grow your brand presence across all major platforms.
- [Influencer Marketing](https://digiveritaz.com/influencer-marketing/): Creator partnerships, campaigns, audience engagement, and ROI-driven growth — from nano to celebrity creators across Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn.
- [Digital PR](https://digiveritaz.com/digital-pr/): Editorial coverage, high-DA backlinks and authoritative brand mentions in tier-1 Indian publications (Economic Times, Forbes India, YourStory, Inc42).
- [Online Reputation Management (ORM)](https://digiveritaz.com/online-reputation-management/): Suppress negative content, monitor brand mentions and build a strong trusted online reputation for your business in India.
- [Content Marketing](https://digiveritaz.com/organic-marketing-services/): Blog strategy, pillar pages, topical clusters and editorial systems that rank — content built to compound visibility over time.
- [WhatsApp Marketing](https://digiveritaz.com/whatsapp-marketing-services/): Broadcast sequences, chatbot automation and click-to-WhatsApp ads that drive customer engagement and leads.
- [Performance Marketing](https://digiveritaz.com/performance-marketing-agency/): Full-funnel campaigns focused on CAC, ROAS and real revenue results — measurable growth at every stage of the funnel.
- [E-commerce Marketing](https://digiveritaz.com/ecommerce-marketing/): Google Shopping, Meta Ads, SEO, email automation and marketplace growth — scale your online store with conversion-first execution.
- [Generative Search Optimisation (GEO)](https://digiveritaz.com/generative-search-optimisation/): Optimize for AI-powered search — get found in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews.

## Advertising

- [PPC / Google Ads](https://digiveritaz.com/pay-per-click/): Keyword strategy, ad copy and conversion tracking across Google Ads and paid platforms — managed for maximum ROI.
- [Display Advertising](https://digiveritaz.com/display-advertising/): GDN, programmatic, retargeting and native ad campaigns built for results — reach your target audience at scale.
- [Facebook & Instagram Ads](https://digiveritaz.com/facebook-instagram-advertising/): Reels, Stories and Advantage+ campaigns built for ROAS — scale reach and conversions on Meta platforms.
- [Google Shopping Ads](https://digiveritaz.com/shopping-ads/): Product feed optimisation, margin-first bidding and full ROAS tracking to drive more e-commerce sales.
- [Paid Social Media](https://digiveritaz.com/paid-social-media-advertising/): Full-funnel campaigns across LinkedIn, X, TikTok and YouTube — scale reach and conversions beyond Meta.
- [Amazon Marketing](https://digiveritaz.com/amazon-marketing/): Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Display Ads and A+ content optimisation to grow your Amazon brand.
- [Native Advertising](https://digiveritaz.com/native-advertising/): Premium publisher placements via Taboola and Outbrain — reach audiences naturally with content that earns attention.

## Design & Content

- [UI/UX Design](https://digiveritaz.com/ui-ux-design/): Conversion-focused digital experiences — wireframes, prototypes and full design systems.
- [Product Design](https://digiveritaz.com/product-design/): User-centred product design — discovery workshops, interaction design and launch-ready specs your team ships.
- [Brand Identity / Branding & Design](https://digiveritaz.com/branding-and-design/): Strategic branding solutions — logo, colour, typography and full brand guidelines to create impactful brand identities.
- [Communication Design](https://digiveritaz.com/communication-design/): Pitch decks, brochures, social templates and sales collateral — communicate your brand clearly.
- [Copywriting](https://digiveritaz.com/content-copy-writing/): Conversion copy, SEO articles, email sequences written by senior strategists — copy that drives action.

## Strategy & Data

- [Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO)](https://digiveritaz.com/conversion-rate-optimisation/): Experiment-led A/B testing, heuristic audits and data-backed changes that improve your conversion results.
- [Revenue Generation](https://digiveritaz.com/revenue-generation/): Full-funnel programmes built around CAC, LTV and cohort retention models to accelerate business growth.
- [Lead Generation (B2B & B2C)](https://digiveritaz.com/lead-generation/): B2B and B2C lead engines with real attribution, lead scoring and MQL-to-SQL flows to generate qualified leads.
- [Fractional CMO](https://digiveritaz.com/cmo-consultancy/): Strategic direction, OKRs, 90-day roadmaps and investor-ready growth narratives — marketing leadership on demand.
- [Landing Page Design](https://digiveritaz.com/landing-page-design/): CRO-optimised copy, design and full conversion tracking delivered in 48 hours.
- [Real Estate Lead Generation](https://digiveritaz.com/real-estate-lead-generation/): RERA-compliant funnels for residential and resale projects — generate qualified property leads.
- [Market Research & Insights](https://digiveritaz.com/research-and-insights/): Audience surveys, cohort analysis, competitor teardowns and modelling for smarter business decisions.
- [Marketing Strategy & Planning](https://digiveritaz.com/strategy-and-planning/): Quarterly horizon models your leadership team can execute on — build a winning marketing roadmap.
- [GA4 Analytics Configuration](https://digiveritaz.com/analytics-configuration/): Proper taxonomy, attribution and Looker Studio dashboards — get clean, actionable data.
- [Google Tag Manager Setup](https://digiveritaz.com/google-tag-manager/): Server-side tagging and consent-mode governance — clean, reliable tracking that holds up.
- [Data Strategy Consulting](https://digiveritaz.com/data-strategy-consulting-services/): Turn data into decisions for smarter marketing measurement and business growth across all teams.

## Tech & Development

- [Website Development](https://digiveritaz.com/website-development/): Custom design, SEO-ready architecture and mobile-first builds — fast, conversion-focused websites.
- [Custom Software Development](https://digiveritaz.com/custom-software-development/): Web apps, automation tools, API integrations and backend systems — scalable custom software.
- [E-commerce Development](https://digiveritaz.com/ecommerce-development/): Shopify, WooCommerce and headless commerce builds optimised for conversion.
- [WordPress Development](https://digiveritaz.com/wordpress-development/): Custom themes, plugin development, speed optimisation and SEO-ready architecture.
- [Mobile App Development](https://digiveritaz.com/mobile-app-development/): iOS and Android apps — UI/UX design, development and App Store launch support.
- [Linux Managed Hosting](https://digiveritaz.com/linux-hosting/): Managed infrastructure, guaranteed uptime and daily backups on secure Linux servers.
- [Business Email Hosting](https://digiveritaz.com/business-email/): Custom domain, spam protection, seamless migration support and complete admin management.
- [CRM Services](https://digiveritaz.com/crm-services/): Pipeline setup, automation workflows and marketing-to-sales data synchronisation.
